primitives.name: Copilot Instructions
primitives.description: Repository-level instructions that customize GitHub Copilot's behavior for your project. These files provide context about coding conventions, preferred patterns, and project-specific guidelines.

primitives.name: Claude Code Instructions
primitives.description: Project-level instructions for Claude Code that define coding standards, architectural patterns, and project-specific context to guide AI assistance.

primitives.name: OpenAI Codex Instructions
primitives.description: Project-level instructions for OpenAI Codex CLI that define coding standards, preferred libraries, and project conventions.

primitives.name: Copilot Custom Instructions
primitives.description: VS Code-level custom instructions files that provide additional context and guidelines for GitHub Copilot chat interactions.

primitives.name: Copilot Saved Prompts
primitives.description: Reusable prompt files for GitHub Copilot that can be shared across a team. These prompts capture common workflows and can be invoked directly in Copilot Chat.

primitives.name: Claude Code Saved Prompts
primitives.description: Saved command templates for Claude Code that automate repetitive tasks and capture best practices for common development workflows.

primitives.name: Copilot Custom Agents
primitives.description: Custom chat participants (agents) for GitHub Copilot that extend its capabilities with domain-specific knowledge and specialized tools.

primitives.name: Copilot Reusable Prompts (Skills)
primitives.description: Reusable prompt-based skills for GitHub Copilot that provide specialized capabilities and domain expertise through structured prompt engineering.

primitives.name: Claude Code Custom Slash Commands
primitives.description: Project-specific slash commands for Claude Code that capture team conventions and automate common development patterns.

primitives.name: Copilot MCP Server Configuration
primitives.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configuration for GitHub Copilot that connects AI to external tools, APIs, and data sources for enhanced context.

primitives.name: Claude Code MCP Server Configuration
primitives.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configuration for Claude Code that enables integration with external tools and services.

primitives.name: OpenAI Codex MCP Server Configuration
primitives.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configuration for OpenAI Codex CLI that connects to external tools and data sources.

primitives.name: Copilot Agent Hooks
primitives.description: Lifecycle hooks for GitHub Copilot that execute custom shell commands at key points during agent sessions, such as before/after tool use, session start/stop, and context compaction.

primitives.name: Claude Code Agent Hooks
primitives.description: Lifecycle hooks for Claude Code that execute custom shell commands at key points during agent sessions, enabling automated validation, formatting, and security enforcement.

categories.name: Instructions
categories.description: Project-level instruction files that guide AI assistant behavior

categories.name: Saved Prompts
categories.description: Reusable prompt templates for common development workflows

categories.name: Custom Agents
categories.description: Custom AI agent definitions with specialized capabilities

categories.name: Skills
categories.description: Reusable skills and slash commands for AI assistants

categories.description: Model Context Protocol server configurations for tool integration
